input.background: If a parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability, then the system reliability is given by R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999.
input.question: Similarly, it can be shown that for a 3-component parallel system, the system MTTF is given by M_tbf=1/λ_1 + 1/λ_2 + 1/λ_3 - 1/(λ_1 + λ_2) - 1/(λ_1 + λ_3) - 1/(λ_2 + λ_3) + 1/(λ_1 + λ_2 + λ_3).
